OWASP, CWE, PCI DSS, MISRA C++:2023 compliance

casdoor.name: Casdoor
casdoor.short_description: Casdoor is an open-source identity and access management platform supporting OAuth, OIDC, SAML, LDAP, and an MCP server for AI-agent management.

features.description: Supports OAuth 2.0, OIDC, SAML, CAS, LDAP, WebAuthn, and MFA.
features.title: Multi-protocol IAM

features.description: Built-in connectors for social networks and enterprise identity systems such as Google, GitHub, and WeChat.
features.title: 100+ identity provider integrations

features.description: A built-in Model Context Protocol server that lets AI agents manage Casdoor through natural language.
features.title: MCP server

features.description: Includes per-tool permissions designed for agent-based access.
features.title: OAuth 2.1 with Dynamic Client Registration

features.description: Plans, pricing tiers, payment processing, and subscription management features.
features.title: Built-in SaaS billing

features.description: LLM agent protection with audit trails via OpenTelemetry.
features.title: OpenClaw integration

features.description: Fully open-source project that can be self-hosted.
features.title: Open source and self-hostable

pros: Fully open source and self-hostable at no license cost
Very broad protocol support including OAuth2, OIDC, SAML, CAS, LDAP, and WebAuthn
100+ built-in identity provider connectors
Native MCP server lets AI coding assistants like Claude Desktop, Cursor, and VS Code Copilot manage Casdoor via natural language
Used by large organizations including Intel, VMware Harbor, Docker, and Cisco
cons: No published pricing or SLA for any managed/commercial offering; self-hosting requires operational effort
Documentation and setup are aimed at a technical/developer audience
As a broad multi-protocol platform, initial configuration may require more setup than single-purpose auth tools

faqs.answer: Yes, Casdoor is an open-source project and is free to self-host.
faqs.question: Is Casdoor free?

faqs.answer: Casdoor supports OAuth 2.0, OIDC, SAML, CAS, LDAP, WebAuthn, and MFA.
faqs.question: What protocols does Casdoor support?

faqs.answer: Yes, Casdoor includes a built-in MCP server that lets AI agents like Claude Desktop, Cursor, and VS Code Copilot manage it through natural language.
faqs.question: Does Casdoor support AI agent management?

faqs.answer: Casdoor lists notable users including Intel, VMware Harbor, Docker, Cisco, Microsoft, Alibaba, and Tencent.
faqs.question: Who uses Casdoor?

dropcontact.name: Dropcontact
dropcontact.short_description: GDPR-compliant B2B email finder and data enrichment tool that cleans and deduplicates CRM contacts.

features.description: Finds a GDPR-compliant, verified nominative email address from a website domain, first name, and last name.
features.title: Email finder

features.description: Adds LinkedIn profile URLs, company websites, company size, industry, and French SIREN codes to contact records.
features.title: Data enrichment

features.description: Validates B2B emails, including catch-all domain verification, with a stated 98% valid rate.
features.title: Email verification

features.description: Automatically identifies and merges duplicate contact records.
features.title: Duplicate detection

features.description: Detects when a contact changes companies and updates the record automatically.
features.title: Company change detection

features.description: Corrects name order, fixes spelling, and removes harmful characters from contact data.
features.title: Data cleaning

features.description: Native integrations with Pipedrive and HubSpot, plus 1,200+ tools via Zapier, Make, and n8n.
features.title: CRM integrations

pros: States 100% GDPR compliance using proprietary algorithms rather than personal data resale
Native integrations with Pipedrive and HubSpot, plus broad no-code connector support
Free trial with 50 emails to test before paying
Yearly billing offers a 20% discount
G2 Winter Medal, Easy to Use Medal, and High Performer EMEA recognition
cons: Salesforce and Zoho integrations are listed as coming, not yet native
Growth-plan features like LinkedIn enrichment are not included on the Starter plan
Enterprise pricing requires a minimum of 200,000 credits per month

faqs.answer: Dropcontact is a B2B contact data enrichment and cleaning tool that finds and verifies emails, deduplicates records, and updates contact information.
faqs.question: What is Dropcontact?

faqs.answer: Dropcontact's Starter plan is €79/month and its Growth plan is €120/month, both for 500 credits/month, with a 20% discount for yearly billing.
faqs.question: How much does Dropcontact cost?

faqs.answer: Dropcontact states it is 100% GDPR compliant, using proprietary algorithms instead of personal databases that require consent.
faqs.question: Is Dropcontact GDPR compliant?

faqs.answer: Yes, Dropcontact offers 50 free emails to try before subscribing.
faqs.question: Does Dropcontact have a free trial?

boundary.name: Boundary
boundary.short_description: Boundary is HashiCorp's identity-based access management tool for securely accessing infrastructure without exposing credentials or networks.

features.description: Enable privileged sessions for users and applications based on identity and role.
features.title: Identity-based access

features.description: Automates onboarding of infrastructure resources as hosts.
features.title: Automated service discovery

features.description: Define access policies and configuration as code with the full Terraform provider.
features.title: Terraform provider support

features.description: Visibility into session metrics, events, logs, and traces, with export to monitoring tools.
features.title: Session auditing

features.description: Injects SSH credentials for sessions instead of exposing them to end users.
features.title: SSH credential injection

pros: Identity-based access removes the need for VPNs or shared credentials
Integrates with Terraform for infrastructure-as-code policy management
Session auditing with export to monitoring tools
Both self-managed Community and managed HCP Boundary options available
cons: HCP Boundary pricing beyond the free trial is not published on the site
Requires integration work with existing identity providers
Fewer built-in integrations than more established PAM tools

faqs.answer: A self-managed Community edition is available; HCP Boundary (managed) offers a free trial.
faqs.question: Is Boundary free?

faqs.answer: Secure, identity-based remote access to infrastructure without exposing networks or sharing credentials.
faqs.question: What problem does Boundary solve?

faqs.answer: Yes, it has full Terraform provider support for policies and configuration.
faqs.question: Does Boundary integrate with Terraform?

faqs.answer: HashiCorp's managed cloud offering for Boundary, available with a free trial.
faqs.question: What is HCP Boundary?
